BRIER 1.0.0

    • Data Processing of Genetic Risk Prediction using BRIERs

    • Information Criteria for Hyper-parameter Tuning
    • Recovering Summary-level Input from GWAS Results
  • Reference

Package index

BRIER.FULL

Models that integrate individual level external data to individual-level target data.

BRIERfull()
BRIER.FULL: integration of individual-level external data
BRIERfull.selection()
Model selection for BRIER.FULL fits

BRIER.I

Models that integrate pretrained external models with individual-level target data.

BRIERi()
BRIER.I: integration of pretrained external models with target individual-level data
BRIERi.cv()
Cross-validation for BRIER.I
BRIERi.selection()
Model selection for BRIER.I fits

BRIER.S

Models that integrate summary-level external data to summary-level target data

BRIERs()
BRIER.S: integration of pretrained external models with GWAS summary statistics
BRIERs.selection()
Model selection for BRIER.S fits

Predictions

Make predictions of a fitted BRIER object on an independent testing set

predict(<BRIER>)
Predict from a BRIER object
predict(<BRIER.eta>)
Predict from a single BRIER fit
coef(<BRIER>)
Coefficients from a BRIER object
coef(<BRIER.eta>)
Coefficients from a single BRIER fit

Data processing

Data processing of input data

p2cor()
Convert GWAS p-values to marginal correlations
calLD()
Calculate LD matrix for BRIER.S
standardize_X()
Standardize a design matrix

Plotting

Plotting functions for visualizing the results of BRIER.

plot(<eta>)
Plot and evaluate predictive performance as a function of integration weight eta
plot(<box>)
Boxplot of predictive performance across bootstrap resamples
plot(<importance>)
Plot variable importance via bootstrap stability selection

Other utilities

Additional helper functions.

g_link()
Forward link function
ginv_link()
Inverse link function
calcDev()
Element-wise deviance
calcNullDev()
Null deviance
evalMetric()
Compute a predictive performance metric
pseudo_validation()
Pseudo-validation score for summary-statistics models
calcExtY()
Compute external linear predictions and aggregate multiple external models
calcExtXtY()
Compute external XtY predictions and aggregate multiple external models

Datasets

Simulated example datasets.

Data_BRIERfull
Simulated example data for BRIERfull
Data_BRIERi
Simulated example data for BRIERi
Data_BRIERs
Simulated example data for BRIERs

Internals

Internal helpers, not intended for end users.

LD_blocks()
LD Block Structured SNP grouping
LD_sigma()
Block-Structured LD Calculation
cd_glm_fit_ssr()
Coordinate descent for GLM with sequential strong rule
cd_summary_fit()
Coordinate descent for BRIERs estimation procedure
cd_wgaussian_fit_ssr()
Coordinate descent for weighted Gaussian regression with sequential strong rule
cd_wglm_fit_ssr()
Coordinate descent for weighted GLM with sequential strong rule
maxlambda_summary()
Maximum Lambda Selection for Summary Statistics
maxprod()
Maximum scaled inner product
unstand_beta()
Unstandardize coefficients
wstandardize_X()
Weighted standardization of a design matrix

On this page
